effect.name: Allpass Delay Line (Non-interpolating)
effect.description:
Allpass Delay Line (Non-interpolating) (LADSPA 1895)
Automatically adapts to the number of channels and sampling rate of the consumer.
effect.author: Andy Wingo (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Decay Time
parameter.comment:
Time for the echoes to decay by 60 dB.
If this time is negative, then the feedback coefficient will be negative, thus emphasizing only odd harmonics at an octave lower.
